headline: A $185,000 Portfolio That Covers Your Groceries, Utilities, and Phone Bill Every Month
summary: The average American household spends about $519 a month on groceries, based on the latest BLS Consumer Expenditure Survey figure of $6,224 a year, and grocery prices are still rising: food-at-home prices were up 1.9% year over year as of March 2026. Add about $280 for utilities and roughly $100 for phone and internet, plus ... A $185,000 Portfolio That Covers Your Groceries, Utilities, and Phone Bill Every Month

headline: Lockheed Martin HIMARS Deal Highlights Undervalued Stock And Defense Focus
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) has secured a major contract to deliver HIMARS rocket launchers to the U.S. Army and allied nations. The agreement covers multiple countries and highlights continued demand for precision rocket artillery systems. The deal adds to the company’s Missiles and Fire Control segment at a time of shifting global defense priorities toward Russia and China. For investors watching NYSE:LMT, this HIMARS contract coincides with the stock trading around $512.41, after a 3.1%...
